scripts.version:sync: node -e "const v=require('fs').readFileSync('VERSION','utf8').trim(); const g=require('child_process').execSync; ['packages/sdk','packages/www','packages/dashboard'].forEach(p=>{const f=p+'/package.json';const j=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(f));j.version=v;require('fs').writeFileSync(f,JSON.stringify(j,null,2)+'\n');}); require('fs').writeFileSync('packages/sdk/src/version.ts',\`export const VERSION = '\${v}';\n\`); console.log('Synced version to '+v)"
